result:
The NS-SEC occupational class variables have been successfully cleaned and harmonized. The final output file 'data/output/cleaned_data.csv' contains:

1. NSID - cohort member identifier
2. nssec17 - NS-SEC at age 17
3. nssec18 - NS-SEC at age 18
4. nssec19 - NS-SEC at age 19
5. nssec20 - NS-SEC at age 20
6. nssec25 - NS-SEC at age 25 (with full-time student category derived)
7. nssec32 - NS-SEC at age 32

All variables have been:
- Harmonized to standard missing value codes (-9 to -1)
- Collapsed from detailed sub-categories to major categories (1-17)
- Converted to labelled factors with appropriate category labels
- Processed according to the specified requirements

The output file is ready for analysis.
